response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with strong open-source contributions, but he lacks the executive-level leadership and formal client advisory experience required for this Head of Development role. Most critically, he only has basic German proficiency, which directly conflicts with the strict minimum C1 requirement necessary for IT consulting and client communication.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience in modern software development and full-stack engineering.
Strong background in open-source technologies and Linux environments.
Proven ability to mentor developers through technical workshops, katas, and course creation.
concerns: Lacks the minimum C1 German language proficiency required for the role.
Missing executive-level leadership and formal IT consulting/client advisory experience.
No demonstrated expertise in UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/compliance.
